system.vehicleTraits: From Beyond (immune to Fear/Pinning/Insanity), Auto-stabilised, Unnatural Strength[12], Unnatural Toughness[12], Unnatural Agility[2], Fear(4), Size[Monumental]
system.pilotTalents: Ambidextrous, Assassin Strike, Blademaster, Catfall, Crushing Blow, Hard Target, True Grit, Preternatural Speed, Sprint
system.history: A massive Eldar wraithbone construct animated by the spirit stone of a dead warrior. Virtually immune to psychological effects and phenomenally agile for its size.
system.specialRules:
Wounds: 100 (use Wounds, not Structural Integrity).
Shimmershield: PR 40 Force Field, overloads on 1-5.
Ghostflight: counts as Jump Pack.
Armour: Wraithbone 20 all facings.
From Beyond: immune to Fear, Pinning, and Insanity.
